title: activate_subscription: late payment grants operator subscription_days not invoice duration
description: payment_watcher.rs activate_subscription() uses max(invoice.expires_at, now + subscription_days). For a late-arriving payment the subscriber gets now + current subscription_days, NOT now + the duration the invoice specified. If SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS was lowered after invoice creation, subscriber is shortchanged. The comment claims 'they must receive what they paid for' but the code does not fulfill that.
